title: phellodendron amurense var. wilsonii
intro: Phellodendron amurense var. wilsonii, also known as Wilson's Chinese cork tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phellodendron amurense var. wilsonii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and relieving stress, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Phellodendron amurense var. wilsonii can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal use.
